title: sabia racemosa subsp. racemosa
intro: Sabia racemosa subsp. racemosa, also known as Sabia, is a plant species native to China that belongs to the family Sabiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and relieve various health conditions.
